atomic_facts.fact: A warning was issued to Singapore Computer Society for failing to put in place reasonable security measures to prevent the accidental disclosure of the personal data of 214 registrants of an event via email.

atomic_facts.fact: enforcement outcome of [AMOUNT_REDACTED] and [AMOUNT_REDACTED] were imposed on K Box Entertainment Group (K Box) and its data intermediary, Finantech Holdings, for failing to implement proper and adequate protective measures to secure its IT system, resulting in unauthorised disclosure of the personal data of 317,000 K Box members.
The organisation received a criminal sentence of imprisonment.

inputs.source_text: enforcement outcome of [AMOUNT_REDACTED] and [AMOUNT_REDACTED] were imposed on K Box Entertainment Group (K Box) and its data intermediary, Finantech Holdings, for failing to implement proper and adequate protective measures to secure its IT system, resulting in unauthorised disclosure of the personal data of 317,000 K Box members. K Box was also issued directions and penalised for the absence of a Data Protection Officer.
inputs.summary: enforcement outcome of [AMOUNT_REDACTED] and [AMOUNT_REDACTED] were imposed on K Box Entertainment Group (K Box) and its data intermediary, Finantech Holdings, for failing to implement proper and adequate protective measures to secure its IT system, resulting in unauthorised disclosure of the personal data of 317,000 K Box members. atomic_facts.fact: A enforcement outcome of [AMOUNT_REDACTED] and [AMOUNT_REDACTED] were imposed on Fu Kwee Kitchen Catering Services and its data intermediary, Pixart, respectively, for failing to implement proper and adequate protective measures to prevent unauthorised access of its customers’ personal data, whereby users could access other customers’ personal data by altering the URL of its order preview webpage.
The matter was resolved by the Singapore International Arbitration Centre.

inputs.source_text: A enforcement outcome of [AMOUNT_REDACTED] and [AMOUNT_REDACTED] were imposed on Fu Kwee Kitchen Catering Services and its data intermediary, Pixart, respectively, for failing to implement proper and adequate protective measures to prevent unauthorised access of its customers’ personal data, whereby users could access other customers’ personal data by altering the URL of its order preview webpage. Fu Kwee was also issued directions to send employees for training, appoint a Data Protection Officer and conduct a security audit of its website.
inputs.summary: A enforcement outcome of [AMOUNT_REDACTED] and [AMOUNT_REDACTED] were imposed on Fu Kwee Kitchen Catering Services and its data intermediary, Pixart, respectively, for failing to implement proper and adequate protective measures to prevent unauthorised access of its customers’ personal data, whereby users could access other customers’ personal data by altering the URL of its order preview webpage. The matter was resolved by the Singapore International Arbitration Centre.

atomic_facts.fact: An enforcement outcome resulted for GMM Technoworld for failing to implement proper and adequate security measures on its official website, resulting in an unauthorised public disclosure of approximately 190 of its customers' personal data.
The PDPC awarded damages to affected individuals.

atomic_facts.fact: Re Propnex Realty was prosecuted in the criminal courts and its directors were imprisoned.

atomic_facts.fact: An enforcement outcome resulted for Tech Mahindra (Singapore), as a data intermediary, for failing to make reasonable security arrangement to prevent unauthorised access and unauthorised modification of Singapore Telecommunications Limited customers' personal data via MyBill (mybill.singtel.com) and MyAccount (myaccount.singtel.com) webpages.
The organisation received a criminal sentence of imprisonment.
